summary: While the CRNA role offers excellent time-off benefits, it is an unsuitable career choice because it necessitates the very skills—rapid mental math and fast-paced analytical deduction—that you find most challenging. The 'Very High' stress rating and life-or-death stakes create a high-pressure environment that significantly undermines a focus on personal wellbeing. Furthermore, the unpredictable end times for surgeries and the potential for mandatory on-call duties conflict with your priority for predictable hours and a sustainable workload.
